channel.title: port on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in port on IT notes

item.title: update port
item.description: Make a copy of the current port: cp -R <port-name> <port-name>.orig Work on the port: make makesum make checksum make stage make check-orphans make package make install make deinstall make clean Crete the diff, first change one level up: diff -u port-name.orig port-name > port-name.diff Submit the patch.

To start an application on port 80 being not root: sysctl net.inet.ip.portrange.reservedhigh=79 That will allow to bind an application in any port > 79, to allow any port: sysctl net.inet.ip.portrange.reservedhigh=0 Add this to /etc/sysctl.conf to keep changes persistent across reboots: net.inet.ip.portrange.reservedhigh=79
